chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.1013 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For hearing of bail application 20.10.2025 Mr. Hashmat Khalid, Advocate for the Applicant Mr. Allah Waraho Khan, Advocate for Complainant Mr. Muhammad Noonari, APG, Sindh ************ Learned Counsel for the Applicant after arguing the matter at some length, does not press this Criminal Bail Application and states that the directions may be given to the learned Trial Court to conclude the trial and decide the subject case expeditiously. Such proposal is not opposed by the learned Assistant Prosecutor General, Sindh. In view of above, this Criminal Bail Application is dismissed as not pressed. The expeditious trial is a right of an accused; therefore, the learned Trial Court is directed to decide the subject case preferably within a period of sixty days positively from the date of receipt of this Order and to furnish such progress report to the MIT-II of this Court. It is made clear that no adjournment would be granted to either party on flimsy ground. Let a copy of this Order be communicated to the learned Trial Court for compliance. JUDGE Qurban
